error.signature: Failed to import asset: 'Assets/Models/character.fbx'. Error: Could not process asset

verdict.summary: Asset import pipeline failed. Corrupt file, unsupported format, or missing external dependency (e.g., FBX SDK).

dead_ends.action: Rename the file extension to force a different importer
dead_ends.why_fails: Unity selects importers by content type, not just extension. Renaming causes further confusion.

dead_ends.action: Delete and re-download the asset repeatedly
dead_ends.why_fails: If the asset file is corrupt at the source, re-downloading gets the same corrupt file.

workarounds.action: Re-export from the source application with compatible settings
workarounds.how: Blender: Export FBX with 'Apply Transforms' checked; use Binary FBX format, not ASCII

workarounds.action: Check the Console for the specific import error details
workarounds.how: Console > click the error > check Inspector for import settings; try different compression/format

workarounds.action: Clear the Library/Artifacts folder to force reimport
workarounds.how: Close Unity > delete Library/Artifacts/ > reopen project; forces fresh import of all assets
